sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58035" key="kluste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλυσ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n58035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must wash out</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> </bibl> <pb n="963" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg004:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.20</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n58035.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέος, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be washed out</tr_>, Lycusap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:28:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.28.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
